subject: Fix HostController Missing Class (TASK-008) + SEO Schema Markup (TASK-014)

task_008.title: Fix HostController Missing Class

action.step_1: Run: grep -rn 'HostController' routes/ to find the route
action.step_2: Decide: is this route intentional or a leftover?
action.step_3a: If leftover: remove the route from routes/web.php
action.step_3b: If needed: create app/Http/Controllers/FrontEnd/HostController.php with appropriate methods

task_008.verification: php artisan route:list --path=frontend should run without exceptions

task_014.title: Add JSON-LD Schema Markup to Room Details
task_014.where_to_add: In @section('content') before closing of airbnb-detail-page, or in layout head section
task_014.blade_implementation: Add <script type='application/ld+json'>{{ json_encode($schemaData, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE|JSON_PRETTY_PRINT) }}</script> in @section('script'). Build $schemaData in controller or inline @php block.
